title: AppEvent enum and client_task skeleton
description:
## Why
The background network task and the UI communicate via an mpsc channel of AppEvent values. Both sides need this type defined before either can be implemented.

## What
- AppEvent enum covering: SessionFetched, ChatsLoaded, MessagesLoaded, NewMessage, ChatUpdated, ContactsLoaded, ConnectionError, TypingEvent, PresenceEvent
- client_task async fn signature: takes Config + AuthProvider + Sender<AppEvent>
- Stub implementation that connects, fetches session, sends SessionFetched, then loops on SSE
- cargo check passes
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
